title: Superior 10 Pack Meal Prep Containers - 32oz Reusable 3 Compartment Food Containers–Microwave and Dishwasher Safe Prep Plastic Food Containers with Lid Divided Bento Box Lunch Tray
features: Heavy Duty Takeaway Containers: Made from premium thickened PP material, these food containers are unbreakable and built to last. With a sturdy construction, the compartment lunch box resist cracks, ensuring your meals stay secure no matter where you go

Airtight & Odor-Free: Keep your food fresh and mess-free! These meal prep containers feature an airtight seal to lock in freshness and prevent leaks. The odor-resistant material of these containers ensures your meals taste as good as they look, without any unwanted smells

Perfect Balanced Diets: Plan your meals like a pro with this 1000ml plastic food containers with lids & its 3-compartment design—1 large (16oz) and 2 small (8oz each) sections allow you to serve wet and dry foods separately. Perfect food containers with lids for portion control, meal prepping, and meeting your nutritional goals

Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe: Enjoy effortless meal preparation and cleanup! Our versatile lunch box with compartments can withstand temperatures from -10°C to 120°C, making these plastic containers with lids ideal for reheating in the microwave, storing in the freezer, and cleaning in the dishwasher

Space-Saving & Travel-Friendly: With a stackable design, Superior food containers with compartments save valuable storage space in your kitchen. The transparent lids of meal containers make it easy to identify contents at a glance, while their lightweight build makes them perfect for gym meals, office lunches, picnics, and more
